title: Epoxy Floors for Gymnasiums - Elite South Texas
content:
Gymnasiums
As an alternative to traditional wooden floors, our custom fluid applied flooring systems make durable gymnasium flooring. The surfaces are abrasion, stain and slip resistant. These flooring systems can be customized to include floor markings, line striping and to match any design element or meet specific branding and color requirements.
Advantages
Custom logos and floor markings
Easy to clean and maintain
Ultra-durable, high abrasion resistance withstands heavy traffic
Fluid applied systems for new construction or existing floor restoration
Finish options include gloss or satin
Adjustable slip resistance based on requirements
Antimicrobial and stain resistant
Seamless, impermeable and non-porous flooring
Gymnasium flooring
Concession areas
Locker rooms and restrooms
Interior and exterior sports surfaces
Entranceways and lobbies
Supply, utility, and mechanical rooms
